data.title: Add allowlist bypass to brainstorm gate hook
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] hook_brainstorm_gate in session-misc-functions.sh checks for active skill context before blocking
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist\|active-skill-context\|bypass" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] Allowlisted skills include at minimum: fix-bug, debug-everything, sprint, implementation-plan, preplanning
  Verify: grep -q "fix-bug\|debug-everything\|sprint" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] Hook returns exit 0 (allow) when active skill context matches an allowlisted skill, even without sentinel
  Verify: env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -qv "FAIL"
- [ ] Hook still blocks (exit 2) when no sentinel AND no allowlisted skill context
  Verify: env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -qv "FAIL"

## Implementation Details
Modify hook_brainstorm_gate() in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh:
1. After the enforce_entry_gate config check and before the sentinel check, add an allowlist bypass:
   - Check for ARTIFACTS_DIR/active-skill-context file
   - If it exists, read the skill name from it
   - Check against an allowlist array: (fix-bug debug-everything sprint implementation-plan preplanning resolve-conflicts architect-foundation retro)
   - If match: return 0 (allow) with a log message
   - If no match or file doesn't exist: continue to sentinel check
2. Document the allowlist update process in a comment

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from previous task must pass (GREEN) after implementation.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh (modify)
